hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -iE "(DROP\s+TABLE|DELETE\s+FROM\s+\w+\s*$|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE)" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive SQL detected. Use migrations for schema changes." >&2; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -iE "rm\s+-rf\s+/" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive rm -rf detected." >&2; exit 1; fi'
